Returns & Exchange Policy

Thank you for shopping with LV’s Trendz. We strive to provide high-quality products and a smooth shopping experience for all our customers.

Please read our Returns & Exchange Policy carefully before making a purchase.

Exchange Policy

We offer exchanges only in the following cases:

  • Size mismatch or fitting issues

  • Damaged or defective product received

To request an exchange, customers must contact us within 48 hours of receiving the order with:

  • Order number

  • Clear product images

  • Reason for exchange

Products must be:

  • Unused and unworn

  • In original condition

  • With all tags and packaging intact

Once approved, our team will guide you through the exchange process.

No Return Policy

We do not offer returns or refunds once an order has been delivered successfully.

Please review product details, sizing information, and order details carefully before placing your order.

Non-Exchangeable Items

The following items are not eligible for exchange:

  • Products without original tags or packaging

  • Worn, washed, or damaged items caused after delivery

  • Customized or altered products

  • Sale or discounted items (if applicable)

Exchange Approval

All exchange requests are subject to inspection and approval by the LV’s Trendz team. We reserve the right to reject exchange requests that do not meet our policy conditions.

Shipping Charges

Customers may be responsible for exchange shipping charges unless the product received is damaged or defective.

Contact Us

For exchange-related support, please contact us through LV’s Trendz with your order details.
